title: Generate R program for 14-2.02 Concomitant Medications

inputs.prompt: Write an R program using rtables or Tplyr to generate 14-2.02: Concomitant Medications. The program must: (1) Read ADCM dataset, (2) Filter to Safety population, (3) Implement analysis: ATC class grouping, medication prevalence by treatment, most common medications, (4) Format table with treatment group columns (Placebo, Xanomeline Low, Xanomeline High), (5) Output as RTF document matching mock shell layout.
